code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur: Int = 0
  mut has: Bool = false
  mut neg: Bool = false
  mut i: Int = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has
        let v = if neg
          -cur
        else
          cur
        end
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
        cur = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    else if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    let v = if neg
      -cur
    else
      cur
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  end
  nums
end

fn collapse(_ nums: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut j: Int = 0
  let m = list.len(nums)
  while j < m
    let v = match list.get(nums, j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let rn = list.len(result)
    if rn == 0
      result = list.push(result, v)
    else
      let last = match list.get(result, rn - 1)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if last != v
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  result
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line)
let result = collapse(nums)

mut out: String = ""
mut k: Int = 0
let p = list.len(result)
while k < p
  let v = match list.get(result, k)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
